entities.name: CLIMATE-SMART AGRICULTURE
entities.description: An approach to feed the growing world population under climate change, encompassing productivity, adaptation, and mitigation

entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE
entities.description: The environmental condition driving the need for climate-smart agriculture

entities.name: INSTITUTIONAL PERSPECTIVES
entities.description: The viewpoints and frameworks regarding institutional dimensions within CSA literature

entities.name: INSTITUTIONAL ANALYSIS FRAMEWORK
entities.description: The method used to analyze publications to identify institutional dimensions

entities.name: PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: One of the three pillars of CSA, prioritized in middle and low-income countries

entities.name: ADAPTATION
entities.description: One of the three pillars of CSA, prioritized in middle and low-income countries

entities.name: MITIGATION
entities.description: One of the three pillars of CSA, predominantly addressed in high-income countries

entities.name: HIGH-INCOME COUNTRIES
entities.description: Regions where CSA mitigation is predominantly addressed

entities.name: MIDDLE AND LOW-INCOME COUNTRIES
entities.description: Regions where CSA productivity and adaptation are priorities

entities.name: KNOWLEDGE INFRASTRUCTURE
entities.description: An institutional aspect focused on in CSA literature

entities.name: MARKET STRUCTURE
entities.description: An institutional aspect focused on in CSA literature

entities.name: HARD INSTITUTIONAL ASPECTS
entities.description: Institutional aspects that have received significant focus in CSA literature

entities.name: PHYSICAL INFRASTRUCTURE
entities.description: An institutional aspect that has received less attention in CSA literature

entities.name: ACTORS' INTERACTION
entities.description: An institutional aspect that has received less attention in CSA literature

entities.name: HISTORICAL, POLITICAL, AND SOCIAL CONTEXT
entities.description: Contextual factors that may influence the uptake of CSA options

entities.name: CSA TECHNOLOGIES
entities.description: Technologies promoted within the climate-smart agriculture approach

entities.name: TECHNOLOGY PACKAGES
entities.description: Integrated sets of technologies used to promote CSA

entities.name: INSTITUTIONAL ENABLING FACTORS
entities.description: Factors that, when integrated with technology packages, can provide opportunities for scaling CSA
